name: Can I sue OpenAI if ChatGPT gave me wrong legal info?

mainEntity.name: Can I sue OpenAI if ChatGPT gave me wrong legal info?

acceptedAnswer.description: Unlikely success; terms disclaim advice liability, and no duty to lay users.[1] Courts focus on user verification.[2] Key factors: EULA waivers; negligence proof; harm causation. Read terms; sue lawyer if involved instead. Focus on real counsel.
